summary: Tested pet switching fix for pillar pages. Code review confirms correct implementation: Navbar dispatches petSelectionChanged event -> PillarContext listens and updates currentPet -> PillarPageLayout consumes from context -> UnifiedHero receives updated pet prop. Browser automation partially successful - confirmed login, dashboard with 3 pets (TestMeister, Lola, Mojo), pillar page hero displays current pet, DiceBear avatar fallback visible. Full pet switching interaction test blocked by browser crashes during authenticated navigation.

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes when navigating to pillar pages after authentication - could not fully test pet switching interaction via UI
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - Unable to fully verify fix via automated testing

action_items: Manual testing recommended: Login -> Navigate to Celebrate -> Click 'My Pets TestMeister' dropdown -> Select Lola -> Verify hero updates to 'Celebrations for Lola'
Verify Pet Soul avatar click navigates to /pet-soul/{petId}
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation looks CORRECT: petSelectionChanged event is dispatched by Navbar.jsx:1082 and listened by PillarContext.jsx:236
PillarPageLayout correctly consumes currentPet from context (line 122) and passes to UnifiedHero as activePet (line 231)
UnifiedHero pet photo fallback chain includes photo_url, profile_image, and DiceBear fallback (line 173-174)
Pet Soul click handler correctly navigates to /pet-soul/${pet.id} (line 290)

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Login, dashboard, pillar page display confirmed. Pet switching interaction not fully tested due to browser issues

seed_data_creation: Created test pets Lola and Mojo for test@example.com user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: test@example.com / password123 with 3 pets (TestMeister, Lola, Mojo). Pet switching code is correctly implemented based on code review. Browser automation crashes when navigating authenticated pillar pages - consider manual testing or different browser configuration.
